<div class="page-home">
---
title: "DIALLO Amadou | Portfolio"
body-class: home-page
---

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 30px; margin-top: 30px; margin-bottom: 40px;">

<img src="images/profile.jpg" style="width: 160px; height: 160px; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 12px;" />

<div>


<p>
<a href="cv/amadou_diallo_cv.pdf" target="_blank" 
style="display: inline-block; margin-top: 10px; padding: 8px 14px; background-color: #1d4ed8; color: white; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none;">
Download Resume
</a>
</p>


# DIALLO Amadou  
### Junior Data Scientist | ML Engineer | Applied Research Engineer

Applied Machine Learning and Data Science profile with a strong mathematical background.

I build robust predictive models, interpretable ML systems, and research-oriented pipelines for complex data.

</div>

</div>

---

## About Me

Currently completing an M2 in Data Mathematics after a first master's degree in Algebra and Applications, I specialize in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Science, and Topological Data Analysis (TDA).

My work combines business-oriented ML projects (churn prediction, risk modeling) with research-driven approaches involving high-dimensional data and topology-aware representations.

---

## What I Do

### Data Science & Predictive Modeling
Design and evaluation of predictive models with a strong focus on data quality, feature engineering, and business-oriented metrics.

### Machine Learning & Pipelines
Development of end-to-end ML workflows using scikit-learn pipelines, model tuning, and reproducible experimentation.

### Applied Research & Complex Data
Work on high-dimensional data using topology-aware methods (TDA), representation learning, and hybrid ML approaches.

---

## Featured Work

### COVID-19 Diagnostic Prediction
Binary classification model to predict SARS-CoV-2 positivity using clinical and biological data.

[View Project](https://github.com/DialloAmo/covid_analysis)

---

### Customer Churn Prediction *(Work in Progress)*
Predict customer churn and derive actionable business insights.

[View Project](https://github.com/DialloAmo/Customer_Churn_Prediction)

---

## Contact

📧 [amadoudiallodjikesse@gmail.com](mailto:amadoudiallodjikesse@gmail.com)
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/DialloAmo)
🔗 [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/amadou-diallo-454270238)

</div>
